name: Carob Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together carob powder, honey, peanut butter, sesame seeds, wheat germ, and powdered milk.
2. Form the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
3. Roll each ball in graham cracker crumbs.
4. Refrigerate for at least one hour before serving.
This candy is low in salt and high in potassium.
